questions.prompt: Which method reads the text from a tkinter Entry widget?
questions.explanation: The .get() method reads the current text from an Entry widget. It always returns a string.

questions.prompt: How do you connect a button click to a method in tkinter?
questions.explanation: Use the command parameter: tk.Button(parent, text='Go', command=self.myMethod)

questions.prompt: Which layout method uses row and column positioning in tkinter?
questions.explanation: The .grid(row=N, column=N) method places widgets in a table-like layout. ICT162 uses grid for most GUI questions.

questions.prompt: How do you clear all text from a Text widget?
questions.explanation: Use .delete('1.0', tk.END) to clear from position 1.0 (line 1, char 0) to the end.
